zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wood VI於1565年10月14日出生在英國肯特布藍利時，他的父親Richarde Woode16歲，母親Ellen Proude16歲。他於大約1588年與Elizabeth Motte -Wood在英國英格蘭賀特福爾賀特福德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wood VI于1565年10月14日出生在英国肯特布藍利时，他的父亲Richarde Woode16岁，母亲Ellen Proude16岁。他于大约1588年与Elizabeth Motte -Wood在英国英格兰賀特福爾賀特福德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Wood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: mainly a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ (Old English wudu). In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, such as French Bois and Polish Les .
English: in a few cases, a nickname for an eccentric or perhaps a violent person, from Middle English wode ‘frenzied, wild’ (Old English wōd).

variants.name: Woode
meanings: English: variant of   Wood  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 312, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

variants.name: Woods
meanings: English: variant of Wood with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

Irish: adopted as a translation of Ó Cuill ‘descendant of Coll’ (see Quill ), or in Ulster of Mac Con Coille ‘son of Cú Choille’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the wood’, which has also been mistranslated Cox , as if formed with coileach ‘cock, rooster’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wood VI was born on 14 October 1565, in Brenchley, Kent, England, his father, Richarde Woode, was 16 and his mother, Ellen Proude, was 16. He married Elizabeth Motte -Wood about 1588, in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wood VI est né le 14 octobre 1565, à Brenchley, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Richarde Woode, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Ellen Proude, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Motte -Wood environ 1588, à Hertford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Wood VI am 14. Oktober 1565 in Brenchley, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richarde Woode 16 und seine Mutter Ellen Proude 16. Er hat um 1588 in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Motte -Wood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Wood VI è nato il il 14 ottobre 1565 nel Brenchley, Kent, England, il suo padre, Richarde Woode, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Proude, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Motte -Wood circa 1588, nel Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wood VIが1565年10月14日にイギリスケントブレンチリーで生まれた時，父Richarde Woodeは16歳，母Ellen Proudeは16歳であった。約1588年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハートフォードでElizabeth Motte -Woodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wood VI(이)가 1565년 10월 14일 영국 켄트 브렌클리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richarde Woode(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Proude(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1588년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 허트퍼드에서 Elizabeth Motte -Wood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wood VI nasceu em 14 de outubro de 1565, em Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richarde Woode, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Proude, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Motte -Wood aproximadamente 1588, em Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wood VI родился 14 октября 1565 г. в местности бренчли, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Richarde Woode было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Proude, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Motte -Wood около 1588 г. в местности хиртфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Wood VI nació el 14 de octubre de 1565, en Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Richarde Woode, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Ellen Proude, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Motte -Wood aproximadamente 1588, en Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
